ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject at the time of assessment */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the subject */,
  "date_of_assessment" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* The highest level of education completed by the subject */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* The current occupation of the subject */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* The marital status of the subject */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location (city, country) of the subject */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the subject has provided consent for their data to be used in research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psychological_constructs" (
  "construct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each psychological construct */,
  "construct_name" TEXT /* Name of the psychological construct */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the construct */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category to which the construct belongs */,
  "related_constructs" TEXT /* A list of related constructs */,
  "reference" TEXT /* A reference to the literature or source where the construct is defined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("construct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department or team the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* The access level of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the assessment data */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* The device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* A unique identifier for the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the data used in the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject providing the feedback */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment related to the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the subject */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating provided by the subject on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* The type of feedback */,
  "follow_up" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* The date when the follow-up should be conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the external data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* The type of the external data */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* The file containing the external data */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the external data */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* The date the external data was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
